data.name: Alert.Description
data.value: Display warning messages that require attention.

data.name: App.Browser.NoRuntime
data.value: 未找到 WebView2 Runtime，请先安装！

data.name: App.Game.HardLinkTip
data.value: 提示：将启动器安装到与游戏相同的磁盘分区可启用硬链接，切服速度更快

data.name: App.Game.Repair.AlreadyRunning
data.value: 游戏完整性校验正在进行中

data.name: App.Game.Repair.UpdateRunning
data.value: 游戏正在更新或校验中，无法同时执行

data.name: App.GameSetting.ConfirmReplaceArkBili
data.value: 确定要将当前官服替换为B服吗？此操作会覆盖游戏文件

data.name: App.GameSetting.ConfirmReplaceArkOfficial
data.value: Replace the current directory with Official server files? This will overwrite game files.

data.name: App.GameSetting.ConfirmReplaceEndBili
data.value: 确定要将当前目录替换为B服文件吗？此操作会覆盖游戏文件

data.name: App.GameSetting.ConfirmReplaceGlobal
data.value: 确定要将当前目录替换为国际服文件吗？此操作会覆盖游戏文件

data.name: App.GameSetting.ConfirmReplacePlay
data.value: 确定要将当前目录替换为GooglePlay服文件吗？此操作会覆盖游戏文件

data.name: App.GameSetting.PathInvalidMsg
data.value: {0} not found in the selected folder. Please choose the correct game root directory.

data.name: App.GameSetting.ReplaceSuccess
data.value: 替换成功，B服资源包已覆盖至当前目录

data.name: App.GameSetting.SyncSuccessAll
data.value: 路径已同步到 BillBili服 / 国际服 / GooglePlay服

data.name: App.GameSetting.SyncToAll
data.value: 同步路径到 BillBili服 / 国际服 / GooglePlay服

data.name: App.GameSetting.TokenNotFound
data.value: 未找到 Token，请确认游戏已启动

data.name: App.GameSetting.ZipNotFoundOfficial
data.value: Official server resource package (ArkOfficial.zip) not found. Check the load folder.

data.name: App.Setting.HideToTrayOnLaunch
data.value: Hide to tray after launching game

data.name: App.Setting.UseHardLink
data.value: Use hard links for server switching

data.name: App.Skport.AccountPlaceholder
data.value: 请输入鹰角网络手机号 / 邮箱

data.name: App.Skport.Action.GetGrantCode
data.value: 使用 token 获取授权码

data.name: App.Skport.Auto.AlreadyDone
data.value: 今日已执行过自动签到，已跳过。

data.name: App.Skport.Auto.NoToken
data.value: 未配置 Token，自动签到已跳过。

data.name: App.Skport.AutoSignHint
data.value: 开启后启动器运行期间每日自动签到一次，并在右下角提示结果

data.name: App.Skport.Error.CredMissing
data.value: 获取 cred 失败：返回结果缺少 cred 或 token。

data.name: App.Skport.Error.GrantCodeMissing
data.value: 使用 token 获取授权码失败：返回结果缺少 code。

data.name: App.Skport.Log.NoBindings
data.value: [{0}] 未找到可签到的终末地绑定角色。

data.name: App.Skport.Log.WaitNext
data.value: 等待 {0} 秒后继续处理下一个账号...

data.name: App.Skport.PasswordFailedPrefix
data.value: 账号密码登录获取 Token 失败：

data.name: App.Skport.PasswordLoginStart
data.value: 开始使用账号密码登录...

data.name: App.Skport.PasswordSubtitle
data.value: 使用鹰角网络账号登录，成功后会自动保存 Token。

data.name: App.Skport.PasswordSuccess
data.value: 账号密码登录成功，Token 已保存。

data.name: App.Skport.StartupSignHint
data.value: 开机后后台执行一次签到，不显示主窗口，完成后用右下角通知提示

data.name: App.Skport.TokenHint
data.value: 使用英文分号 ; 分隔，支持多账号签到

data.name: App.Skport.TokenPlaceholder
data.value: 请输入 SKPORT Token，多个 Token 用 ; 分隔

data.name: App.Skyland.AccountPlaceholder
data.value: 请输入手机号 / 账号

data.name: App.Skyland.Action.GetGrantCode
data.value: 使用 token 获取授权码

data.name: App.Skyland.Auto.AlreadyDone
data.value: 今日已执行过自动签到，已跳过。

data.name: App.Skyland.Auto.NoToken
data.value: 未配置 Token，自动签到已跳过。

data.name: App.Skyland.AutoSignHint
data.value: 开启后启动器运行期间每日自动签到一次，并在右下角提示结果

data.name: App.Skyland.Error.CredMissing
data.value: 获取 cred 失败：返回结果缺少 cred 或 token。

data.name: App.Skyland.Error.GrantCodeMissing
data.value: 使用 token 获取授权码失败：返回结果缺少 code。

data.name: App.Skyland.Error.QrExpired
data.value: 二维码已过期，请重新生成。

data.name: App.Skyland.Error.ScanMissing
data.value: 创建扫码登录失败：返回结果缺少 scanId 或 scanUrl。

data.name: App.Skyland.Error.ScanTimeout
data.value: 扫码登录超时，请重新生成二维码。

data.name: App.Skyland.Error.ScanTokenMissing
data.value: 扫码登录失败：返回结果缺少 token。

data.name: App.Skyland.Log.NoBindings
data.value: [{0}] 未找到可签到的明日方舟或终末地绑定角色。

data.name: App.Skyland.Log.WaitNext
data.value: 等待 {0} 秒后继续处理下一个账号...

data.name: App.Skyland.PasswordFailedPrefix
data.value: 账号密码获取 Token 失败：

data.name: App.Skyland.PasswordLogging
data.value: 正在使用账号密码登录...

data.name: App.Skyland.PasswordSubtitle
data.value: 使用森空岛账号登录，成功后会自动保存 Token。

data.name: App.Skyland.PasswordSuccess
data.value: 账号密码登录成功，Token 已保存。

data.name: App.Skyland.Progress.WaitConfirm
data.value: 已扫码，等待在森空岛 App 内确认登录...

data.name: App.Skyland.QrHint
data.value: 请使用森空岛 App 扫码，并在 App 内确认登录后点击确定。

data.name: App.Skyland.ScanFailedPrefix
data.value: 扫码获取 Token 失败：

data.name: App.Skyland.ScanSuccess
data.value: 扫码登录成功，Token 已保存。

data.name: App.Skyland.ScanSuccessToast
data.value: 扫码登录成功，Token 已保存

data.name: App.Skyland.SmsFailedPrefix
data.value: 手机号验证码获取 Token 失败：

data.name: App.Skyland.SmsLogging
data.value: 正在使用手机号验证码登录...

data.name: App.Skyland.SmsSubtitle
data.value: 输入森空岛绑定手机号，获取验证码后自动登录。

data.name: App.Skyland.SmsSuccess
data.value: 手机号验证码登录成功，Token 已保存。

data.name: App.Skyland.SmsTitle
data.value: 手机号验证码获取 Token

data.name: App.Skyland.StartupSignHint
data.value: 开机后后台执行一次签到，不显示主窗口，完成后用右下角通知提示

data.name: App.Skyland.TokenHint
data.value: 使用英文分号 ; 分隔，支持多账号签到

data.name: App.Skyland.TokenPlaceholder
data.value: 请输入森空岛 Token，多个 Token 用 ; 分隔

data.name: App.Switch.ConfirmMsg
data.value: Switching servers requires closing the running game. Continue?

data.name: App.Switch.NoPayload
data.value: 未找到切服资源（文件夹或 ZIP 均不存在）

data.name: App.Sync.DialogTitle
data.value: 选择要联动启动的程序

data.name: App.Sync.EmptySub
data.value: 点击右上角「+ 添加」来添加软件

data.name: App.Update.ChangelogHint
data.value: 点击检查更新后显示内容。

data.name: App.Update.CheckFailed
data.value: 检查失败，请检查网络连接。

data.name: App.Update.ReminderSubtitle
data.value: 当前版本 v{0}，可更新到 v{1}

data.name: Avatar.Description
data.value: Used to represent users or things, supporting the display of images, icons, or characters.

data.name: Badge.Description
data.value: Small numerical value or status descriptor for UI elements.

data.name: Breadcrumb.Description
data.value: Display the current location within a hierarchy. And allow going back to states higher up in the hierarchy.

data.name: Calendar.Description
data.value: A container that displays data in calendar form.

data.name: Collapse.Description
data.value: A content area which can be collapsed and expanded.

data.name: ContextMenuStrip.Description
data.value: Right click on the current page at will

data.name: DatePicker.Description
data.value: To select or input a date.

data.name: Divider.Description
data.value: A divider line separates different content.

data.name: Drawer.Description
data.value: A panel that slides out from the edge of the screen.

data.name: GridPanel.Describe
data.value: -The column width attribute is before, and the row height attribute is after; grouping. Each row represents the number of row height attributes corresponding to the number of rows, with spaces separating each number

data.name: GridPanel.Description
data.value: Grid layout container with precise division of areas.

data.name: Icon.PlaceholderText
data.value: Search icons here, click icon to copy code

data.name: Input.Description
data.value: Through mouse or keyboard input content, it is the most basic form field wrapper.

data.name: InputNumber.Description
data.value: Enter a number within certain range with the mouse or keyboard.

data.name: Message.Description
data.value: Display global messages as feedback in response to user operations.

data.name: Modal.Description
data.value: Display a modal dialog box, providing a title, content area, and action buttons.

data.name: PageHeader.Description
data.value: A header with common actions and design elements built in.

data.name: Pagination.Description
data.value: A long list can be divided into several pages, and only one page will be loaded at a time.

data.name: Popover.Description
data.value: The floating card pops up when clicking/mouse hovering over an element.

data.name: Progress.Description
data.value: Display the current progress of the operation.

data.name: Radio.Description
data.value: Used to select a single state from multiple options.

data.name: Rate.Description
data.value: Used for rating operation on something.

data.name: Result.Description
data.value: Used to feedback the processing results of a series of operations.

data.name: Segmented.Description
data.value: Display multiple options and allow users to select a single option.

data.name: Select.Description
data.value: A dropdown menu for displaying choices.

data.name: Slider.Description
data.value: A Slider component for displaying current value and intervals in range.

data.name: Spin.Description
data.value: Used for the loading status of a page or a block.

data.name: Steps.Description
data.value: A navigation bar that guides users through the steps of a task.

data.name: Switch.Description
data.value: Used to toggle between two states.

data.name: Table.Description
data.value: A table displays rows of data.

data.name: Tabs.Description
data.value: Tabs make it easy to explore and switch between different views.

data.name: Tour.Description
data.value: A popup component for guiding users through a product.

data.name: VirtualPanel.Description
data.value: Layout container detached from Winform framework.

data.name: Watermark.btnFormError
data.value: Error occurred while creating form watermark:

data.name: Watermark.btnPanelError
data.value: Error occurred while creating panel watermark:

data.name: Watermark.Description
data.value: Add specific text or patterns to the page.

data.name: App.Game.CustomToolInvalid
data.value: 请输入有效的名称和链接
